name: Event Chains — Five Storylines
author: Emberveil
description: Five multi-node event chains wired through the M133 flag ledger (incrementFlag/consumeFlag/requireFlags) and the existing event-chain v1 schema. Each chain uses `setFlag` to drop markers and `requires` guards on later nodes so the runtime picks up where the previous episode ended.

eventChains.name: Rescue Bessa
eventChains.description: Rescue a captive alchemist Bessa. If abandoned she hunts you down; a rare ring reward triggers a second rescue beat.

nodes.title: Bessa — First Encounter
nodes.text: A muffled cry drifts from a bandit wagon. A woman, gagged and bound, eyes you desperately.

nodes.title: A Grateful Alchemist
nodes.text: 'Bessa,' she says, clasping your hand. 'If you find yourselves near Thornroot, I owe you a gift.' She presses a sealed letter into your palm.

nodes.title: Thornroot Hollow
nodes.text: Bessa's workshop smells of marjoram and tin. She hands you a small iron ring. 'Rare find — for a rarer friend.'

nodes.title: Taken Again
nodes.text: Smoke on the horizon. Bessa's workshop is burning; the marauders have her again.

nodes.title: The Hunt
nodes.text: Months later, a scarred woman blocks the road. 'You left me in that wagon.' She draws a blade.

eventChains.name: Spare Bandit Grenn
eventChains.description: Spare a captured bandit; he warns of an ambush later, and joins your party at level 10 if reputation holds.

nodes.title: Grenn At Sword Point
nodes.text: The bandit kneels, bleeding. 'Spare me and I swear on my brother's grave you'll see me again — for the better.'

nodes.title: A Whisper In The Rain
nodes.text: Weeks later, a hooded figure slips into your camp. 'Grenn. There's an ambush at the next crossing — twelve of them.'

nodes.title: The Offer
nodes.text: Grenn waits at your next town stop. 'You're strong enough now. Let me fight beside you.' (Available at level 10+.)

eventChains.name: Cursed Coin
eventChains.description: A whispering coin rewards acts of corruption; at corruption ≥ 5 it manifests as a boss.

nodes.title: The Coin
nodes.text: A black coin sits in the dust, humming faintly. When you lift it, it whispers a promise: 'Feed me, and grow.'

nodes.title: The First Whisper
nodes.text: 'Strike the merchant. He will not remember.' The coin warms in your palm.

nodes.title: Second Whisper
nodes.text: The coin grows heavier. 'Break an oath. Betray a friend. Each gift compounds.'

nodes.title: The Coin Awakens
nodes.text: The coin grows limbs and fangs. It has eaten enough of you to be itself.

eventChains.name: Spare the Dragon Whelp
eventChains.description: Spare a dragon whelp in act 1; it circles overhead in act 3, and returns as an ally in the act 5 boss.

nodes.title: The Whelp In The Snare
nodes.text: A young dragon, no bigger than a hound, is tangled in a trapper's snare. Its green eyes plead.

nodes.title: A Shadow In The Sky
nodes.text: Two years on. A green shadow circles the mountain pass, screeching once — a greeting, you think — before vanishing.

nodes.title: The Reckoning
nodes.text: At the summit, the Dragon Tyrant descends — and from the clouds, your whelp (now grown) crashes into its back.

eventChains.name: Rival Adventurer
eventChains.description: A rival party crosses your path repeatedly — branch into ally, neutral, or boss based on accumulated choices.

nodes.title: The Rival Meets You
nodes.text: A polished adventurer blocks the tavern door. 'Heard your name twice this week. Drink with me — or step aside.'

nodes.title: The Contested Chest
nodes.text: A dungeon chest — you both reach it at the same moment.

nodes.title: The Crossroads
nodes.text: Your paths meet one last time on a windswept ridge. How the rival greets you depends on everything so far.
